But when Alex is too short to be allowed on the ride- and his friends find themselves stuck at the top of it- Alex saves the day when he realizes that there are advantages to being small, and learns that his body is perfect just the way it is.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild

At first, the gang is excited to have a new friend, but soon the whole zoo develops sloth fever; everywhere they go, people are walking around in sloth masks-- even Kate is fawning over her! Melman, accustomed to getting lots of attention as the baby of the group, worries that Kate loving Lucia will mean less love and attention for him! When Lucia overhears Melman lament that there’s not enough room in the habitat for another animal, she decides to strike out and go someplace where she is welcome. Realizing the error of his unwelcoming ways, Melman and the gang must try to win Lucia back and bring her back to the habitat before Kate (and the rest of the city) notices she’s gone!

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ""living in the future"!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When their favorite zoo visitor loses his teddy bear, our gang goes on a wild adventure through New York City to return it to him - and in the process Marty learns that some things in life can't be found in an instruction manual.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Melman finds a lucky flower and is convinced that today will be his Best Day Ever! But when a series of unlucky events threaten to ruin his day, he’s faced with the choice to drown in his sorrows or “take back the day”!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelps learns about memory spark in an attempt to relive a memory of his grandmother. / Kelp and the underwater gang put on a show to showcase their imaginary sparks. As she practices, however, Scallop becomes convinced her tusk has a real spark!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp is excited to celebrate his right of passage, breaking the ice with his horn. But when he struggles to break the ice like other narwhals, he is determined to do it “the Kelp way.”

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Mr. Tanaka adopts an unruly dog at Sam’s behest, the Zenkos have the job of training the mischievous mutt and turning him into man’s best friend material. / When Ellie's friend Maria is late submitting her painting to the art show, it’s up to the Zenkos to get inside the community center after hours, avoiding overzealous junior security Rodney, and get Maria’s painting on display before the show starts.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: After Lula loses her loose tooth in the park, Team Zenko must find the missing molar and get it under Lula’s pillow in time for the Tooth Fairy’s visit. / Gabriel and Luis show off their new drone but it crash lands on the roof top. Team Zenko's mission is to try and get it back, but Yolanda won't give up her new hi-tech friend that easily.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Alex realizes he’s too small to climb onto his new habitat “stage”, he feels too small for his dreams- until he hears of a big, new roller coaster at Coney Island and figures if he can ride the big coaster, that’ll prove that he’s a BIG deal! But when Alex is too short to be allowed on the ride- and his friends find themselves stuck at the top of it- Alex saves the day when he realizes that there are advantages to being small, and learns that his body is perfect just the way it is.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: The habitat is celebrating “Sloth Day” in honor of its newest arrival: cool, chill, Lucia the sloth, who just arrived from Costa Rica! At first, the gang is excited to have a new friend, but soon the whole zoo develops sloth fever; everywhere they go, people are walking around in sloth masks-- even Kate is fawning over her! Melman, accustomed to getting lots of attention as the baby of the group, worries that Kate loving Lucia will mean less love and attention for him! When Lucia overhears Melman lament that there’s not enough room in the habitat for another animal, she decides to strike out and go someplace where she is welcome. Realizing the error of his unwelcoming ways, Melman and the gang must try to win Lucia back and bring her back to the habitat before Kate (and the rest of the city) notices she’s gone!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Puss and Dulcinea embark on an adventure to find the Fountain of Youth to save Puss' old mentor, El Guante Blanco.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Tired of the Mayor's needy cowardice, Puss tries to reassure him that he is a hero – but being “brave” quickly goes to the Mayor's head.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: The Golem, a giant clay enemy Puss has been outrunning for years, comes to San Lorenzo. With Artephius' help, Puss may be able to defeat his foe.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Jack Sprat steals enchanted boots from the Treasure House and triggers a dangerous Devil Wind that threatens to consume San Lorenzo's treasure.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Dulcinea pulls a magical sword from a stone and becomes enchanted with heroic powers; Puss must help her learn how to control her newfound strength.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: The evil genius Karl sets out to destroy King Julien. When both Clover and Maurice are captured, King Julien must save them from his new nemesis.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: Exhausted from settling his subjects' disputes, King Julien replaces himself with a dummy king so he can play hooky, unwittingly sparking a rebellion.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: When Toby's ninja brothers try to get him to steal San Lorenzo's treasure, he must decide between them and his friendship with Puss.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: The Duchess seeks Artephius' soul for her spell collection, and it's up to Puss to protect him. It turns out that The Duchess and Artephius have a complicated relationship.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Stoick, Hiccup and Snotlout search for Spitelout when he goes missing, and ultimately find him on a distant island battling a fiery Singetail dragon.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Astrid comes down with the Odin's Revenge flu and the Riders must search for the cure by finding a nearly extinct Buffalord dragon before Viggo does.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: The Riders head to a tropical island for fun in the sun, not realizing it's infested with Grimora Leeches which drives their dragons to turn on them.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: After a crowverine gliding mishap, Dawn loses her confidence and tells Eep she's taking a break from adventures. Eep convinces Dawn to join her on one last adventure – climbing Grrr Mountain.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Hope oversteps by trying to teach Sandy manners, Ugga gets her revenge by challenging Hope to do the impossible: civilize Thunk.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: Ugga has a secret - she's taking Eep to "flop with the bulrusses" - a fun and dangerous pastime Ugga enjoyed as a teen. Ugga's excitement fades when Hope invites herself and Dawn along.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: After Mega Fat is fired from Baby Corp;he’s forced on the path of recovery towards being a Good Baby. However;Mega Fat is more interested in getting revenge on Boss Baby than finding the perfect family to adopt him.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby uses the cover of Halloween Night to sneak into Bubeezee’s Headquarters to shut it all down. Tim covers for Boss by distracting Marisol with a night of trick or treating.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: A brainwashed Boss Baby breaks free from overly sanitized Bubbeezee products. He rallies the Playgroup Babies to run the company out of business by breaking every product in town.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and Jun take a risk in revealing the secret of the Hidden Realm to D’Angelo to aid an injured dragon, and D’Angelo bonds with Plowhorn.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and the others debate how to keep the dragons a secret, even as a rambunctious young “cloaking” dragon gets loose in town and pursues a friendship with a reluctant Alex.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and the Riders try to save ICARIS when it’s revealed to be in danger from a monstrous dragon.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.desc: When Po and the kids stop for the night at an Inn, they meet a gang who wants to fight Po and end up down a path to uncovering Jindiao's evil plan

programme.title: Wizards: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Morgana takes a new title — Mother of Monsters — and vows to usher in an age of reckoning. An epic battle begins in King Arthur's court.

programme.title: Wizards: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Arthur seeks an alliance with the trolls of Dwoza as Gunmar begins building his army. Merlin and Douxie join forces to forge the amulet.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: Keith and Krolia discover troubling details about Lotor

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Eep joins the Scream-Leading team and starts picking up characteristics of her coach, Meep, much to Ugga's chagrin/Meep kicks Snoot out of the cave for not being a brave hunter. The Croods reluctantly take Snoot in and try to make him into a hunter to get him out of their home.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Eep & Thunk want to be in on the new fad of Slateboarding, but must find something to trade with (eggs). Bud and Crud try to corner the egg market/Gran takes in a group of crabby tabbies, and uses their combined crabbiness to get whatever she wants. Grug and Ugga try to get into Snoot's food-sharing party.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: After meeting her riding idols, Pru vows to practice until she's perfect — even if it means missing out on a bonfire her best friends are planning.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: Abigail puts herself at risk to reunite an orphaned otter with his family. But the school veterinarian insists the animal will be safer at the zoo.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Ty can't stop rolling after Skrap-It steals his master cylinder, so the Trux must quickly figure out a fix before he falls off the edge of a cliff

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Bully For You When Casper decides he can't take any more of Thatch's nastiness, he forms a secret squad dedicated to putting an end to bullying. The Ra-minator Using the power of invisibility, Casper offers to help transform Ra from a sports zero to an athletic hero.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Weekend at Bunny's Alder and Dash sound the alarm after a terrifying creature threatens Scare School. Grimly Day It's Grimly Day?the grimmest day of the year!

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert and Ping Pong find a broken bird's nest, containing two eggs, which the Fox Twins have accidentally knocked out of a tree. The Mummy bird is frantic and the friends are determined to save the eggs.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert, Bill and Raggety meet Astra, a star child who has fallen to earth, but she need their help to return to the starry sky as she's used up too much of her ‘twinkle'

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and his underwater friends race around an obstacle course, but Cruz gets sucked into a whirlpool. As each of them try to rescue him, they are sucked in! Kelp saves them all using his unicorn spark to create bubbles he attaches to seaweed. / Kelp helps his unicorn friends create music with their horns and pieces of nature. Ollie is embarrassed by the sound of his horn.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Cruz decides to turn the sunken ship into a park. But all his and Kelp’s “fun-crastinating” puts the project in jeopardy. / Kelp accidentally knocks a boulder into the stream, blocking the flow while trying his unicorn spark. Frustrated by magic, Kelp uses the narwhal way.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Pandy’s birthday!! The dollhouse is throwing a surprise party for him! Gabby goes room to room preparing all his favorite things for the party, but when the big moment comes, Pandy drops his cake! Gabby consoles him and tells him it’s even better – now, they have smash cake! They all hold up a piece and pose for a picture.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a suitcase and a hotel brochure, it’s time to take a trip to The Dollhouse Hotel! Hotel guests Gabby and Pandy check in with the Hotel Manager DJ Catnip then go to Mercat’s Spa and even order room service from Pillow Cat! For our Gabby Cat of the Day Segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: After hearing spooky rumors about the new habitat resident- A BAT- Marty is determined to protect his friends from the newcomer. But when the bat helps him out of a tough situation, Marty learns it’s better to get to know someone rather than judge them on false stereotypes.

programme.desc: Dave and Cody's only survival supplies are the charred remains of a burned-down shack: an axe head, a bison hide, a glass jar, a metal tin and a steel striker.

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S7)
programme.desc: At El Prat Airport, passengers become defensive when they are stopped by officers. In Algeciras, a lorry is concealing something in its base.

programme.desc: At Barajas Airport, two passengers attempt to smuggle illegal substances. At El Prat Airport, a nervous passenger gets caught with contraband.

programme.desc: After multiple homicides occur along Virginia's Colonial Parkway, Authorities task Det. Danny Plott with finding a serial killer.

programme.desc: A bold yet heartbreaking story of a mother and daughter-in-law who meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: Our Happy Days

programme.title: A Graceful Liar
programme.desc: A bold yet heartbreaking story of a mother and daughter-in-law who meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: The Best of Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: Boss in the Mirror
programme.desc: A reality talk show that offers a candid and often humorous look at the workplace through the eyes of Korea's most outspoken bosses. Each episode follows prominent CEOs, entertainers, and professionals as they go about their daily routines and interact with their employees. Through real workplace situations, the show reveals the challenges of leadership, communication, and management.

programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: K-Pop World Festival in Changwon 2025
programme.desc: KBS Changwon K-POP WORLD FESTIVAL is the world's largest Korean Wave festival with global K-POP fans from all over the world.

programme.title: Lovely Horribly
programme.desc: This horror romantic-comedy drama is about the mysterious things that happen when a drama writer who sees ghosts meets a top star who plays the main character of her script.

programme.title: Noona, You Are A Woman To Me
programme.desc: Age is just a number—attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: Stars' Top Recipe at Fun-Staurant

programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. programme.title: Iron Kung Fu Fist
programme.desc: Liang Kun is a skilled martial arts master who left the martial arts world to protect his lover. However, his disappearance leads to her tragic death and as Liang Kun finds a way to survive in the martial arts world, he fights back to avenge his lover’s death with the help of a beggar gang leader.

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation

When his friend suddenly dies, can Frank successfully escape and seek justice for himself?

programme.desc: Gabriella is driven by vengeance after a hybrid monster slaughters her family. On her quest, she joins a squad of Blood Hunters and together they wage war against ruthless underworld warlords, igniting a brutal showdown.

programme.title: The Mask of Shura of Fire Cloud
programme.desc: 18 years ago, the evil Black Feather clan infiltrated the territory of Master Fire Cloud and stole The Mask of Shura, thus releasing an evil spirit that was a baby. Master Fire Cloud adopted the baby to prevent him from becoming evil. When the baby grows up, he takes control of the mask and becomes Fire Cloud’s successor as the city’s guard.

programme.title: Hidden Heroine
programme.desc: A drug cartel is entrenched in the Dong Zhou area. After a fierce battle, Mei and her team manage to successfully defeat the drug cartel and rescue her father.

programme.title: Nezha
programme.desc: A former top team racing driver wants to prove himself in a race but accidentally hurts his teammate Lily, leading to the team’s downfall. When an inexperienced virtual car racing champion joins the team and unexpectedly shines in a real-life race, can the three drivers team up to regain glory for their team?

programme.title: Wu Lin: The Society
programme.desc: Set in 2050, where rampant pollution and viruses force people to wear masks just to breathe, yet daily life continues as usual. When a series of mysterious deaths erupts, police suspect a serial killer while rumors swirl of a demon on a rampage. Now, the police must race to unravel the mystery and stop the killings before panic consumes the city.

programme.title: The Macaque Monkey
programme.desc: The world is in chaos after the tree of life was burnt. Sun Wu Kong decides to return to the past to resurrect it, but his divine power is unstable after losing the golden hoop, and he must find his younger self to team up to find the power of time. As the six-eared Macaque Monkey also wants the power of time, they clash in a fierce battle…

programme.title: Operation Bangkok
programme.desc: Military veteran Wu and undercover cop Ming rescue hostages on an island near Bangkok. Just as the mission is completed and they prepare to leave, Wu discovers his daughter has also been captured. Determined to save her, he stays with Ming to fight the thugs and rescue her.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: Neng was a street fighter in Northeast China but decides to start a new life in Hong Kong’s Kowloon Walled City. Unfortunately, he is implicated in the fights and conspiracies among the triad forces. When his good friend is hunted down by the triad, Neng must team up with the residents of Kowloon Walled City to fight back and save his friend.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Young Ip Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Set in 1917, young Ip Man pursues his studies in Hong Kong. The school is held hostage on the day of an English speech competition, and as Ip Man decides to step up and fight the crisis, it is revealed that his master and his childhood friend are behind all this. Can he take them down and uphold justice?

programme.title: Bride with the White Hair

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Dolmar receives a tip on a home in the Palm River, so he and Amanda head over to scope it out. Even though the home has suspect additions and termite damage, Dolmar feels the deal is too good to pass on.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: Impress your holiday guests with a classic cheesy fondue party! Rachael shows how to make her version of an easy and decadent "Fundue" that is sure to bring everyone around to celebrate the holidays.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers
programme.desc: After a dreamy night on the train, the Earth-Cleaning Bros hit the road again, uplifted by Mongolia’s stunning scenery. But suddenly, Seok-hoon asks the driver to stop. Why?

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: If you're looking for a showstopper dinner-party dish, this is the one. Balsamic and soy-glazed brisket is always a crowd-pleaser. It is fork-tender but with a deep, rich flavour.

programme.title: Her Deadly Night in Paris
programme.desc: An American exchange student in Paris falls in love with her host family's handsome son. But when she witnesses a murder, it sets off a chain of events that will change the young couple's lives forever.

programme.title: My Mother Looked Just Like You
programme.desc: Twenty years ago, Sharon's identical twin vanished. Now, a young woman enters Sharon's life, claiming to be her sister’s daughter and bringing with her a revelation that will upend Sharon's whole life.

programme.title: Got to Leave Something
programme.desc: South Korean actor Kim Nam-gil embarks on a journey with his companion, Lee Sang-yoon. Their first destination is the Punch Bowl village, a place marked by the pain of the divided Korean Peninsula.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: One of Australia's most renowned Malaysian Chefs, Junda Khoo of Ho Jiak, sets a laksa taste-test for the ages.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: It’s the first cook of Sweet Week, and contestants must take their cue from a very gooey mystery box lift, and incorporate an element of ‘goo’ into a dessert.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Poh sets today's Sweet Week pressure test with not one, but three of her extraordinary desserts for the cooks to replicate.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S1)
programme.desc: You don't have to be intimidated by making fish tacos at home. Rachael shows how to make a crispy-flake cod taco with refried beans that you're going to love.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S1)
programme.desc: Rachael cooks up some serious comfort food. With this much flavour, you'd never guess that these robust bull's-eye burgers, topped with sautéed onions and blue-cheese sauce, are actually plant-based.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: They say big things come in small packages, and in this episode host Michael Yo discovers that big flavours can come in small dining spaces as he squeezes into a four-table pancake house in Amsterdam.

programme.title: Casting 1147km
programme.desc: This time, it’s a team mission to portray a heated love triangle. With no script, the actors must create their own storyline and dialogue in just five hours. On top of that, a surprise judge arrives.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: Gather around the table and prepare to give thanks! Rachael shows how to make a tender and crispy smoked turkey, seasoned with herbs and spices and served with chestnut and sausage stuffing.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: As more people are enjoying leisure activities and hobbies at home, the trend of "home entertainment" is gaining popularity. The homes we’re featuring today are all about emphasising home entertainment!

programme.title: One Night Stand Murder
programme.desc: A woman must fight to clear her name after she wakes up in an unfamiliar house with a dead man - and no memory of what happened. Based on true events.

programme.title: Casting 1147km
programme.desc: This time, it’s a team mission to portray a heated love triangle. With no script, the actors must create their own storyline and dialogue in just five hours. On top of that, a surprise judge arrives.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Jack searches for the confidence to try surgery on his throat bump, after fainting during a previous attempt. Bubbly young gym teacher Kristan has given up on love after discovering a growth on her back.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: Judges Gordon Ramsay, Aarón Sánchez and Joe Bastianich crown the next MasterChef champion and the winner of $250,000.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James decides to join up with a former flip partner to attack a zombie house in the form of a 1940s brick bungalow. The deal is overshadowed by the "ghost flip", a flip gone bad from the past with Brian.

programme.title: Casting 1147km
programme.desc: After two intense auditions, the actors show some growth. As they enjoy a rare day off, a variety and acting veteran appears as a surprise mentor, offering advice for surviving the entertainment industry.

programme.title: The Daughter I Gave Away
programme.desc: Fifteen years after a teenage girl places her baby up for adoption, she learns that her daughter has gone missing from the adoptive parent's home. In her search for answers, she uncovers a chilling truth.

programme.desc: Chef Deborah puts a Southern spin on the classic French-inspired chicken fricassee. She starts by seasoning and browning the chicken, then simmers it in a sauce made with vegetables, cream and white wine.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael loves gazpacho, a cold soup made from raw vegetables that is perfect for warm Italian summers. She's holding onto the sunshine with her delicious recipe for green tomato gazpacho.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael's friends Leida and Veina show how to make three types of Albanian pizza, a rustic dish made with phyllo dough filled with beef, chicken and potatoes.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: The remaining chefs face the toughest challenge yet in this celebration of MasterChef’s 250th episode! The kitchen heats up when the chef with immunity gives each contestant an iconic cake to recreate.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: Chefs split into two teams to prepare a lunch for over 100 kids at Dodger Stadium, and the chef with immunity gets to choose one member from each team who must swap sides and work with the other regions.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers
programme.desc: After 11 hours by train, the Earth-Cleaning Bros learn they have 16 more hours to go — off-road! Bouncing and jolting toward a remote nomadic village, they eat, shop and finally reach their stay.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah puts a Southern spin on the classic French-inspired chicken fricassee. She starts by seasoning and browning the chicken, then simmers it in a sauce made with vegetables, cream and white wine.

programme.title: Casting 1147km
programme.desc: After two intense auditions, the actors show some growth. As they enjoy a rare day off, a variety and acting veteran appears as a surprise mentor, offering advice for surviving the entertainment industry.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: House-flipping titan James takes on his toughest challenge yet. When his team finds a hoarder's nightmare with rotting walls, a sketchy layout and a collapsing roof, James is excited by the challenge.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Bagels get elevated from a breakfast dish to a perfect anytime meal with this everything bagel galette with heirloom tomatoes. The spin on a favourite is combined with a chocolate-filled banana bread.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S2)
programme.desc: Angela has a huge growth on the back of her neck that she fears will ruin her daughter's wedding. Loretta is terrified that her oozing skin condition will get in the way of making her movie.

programme.title: Love at First Lie
programme.desc: Kate thinks she's found her perfect online love match in a Walker, a jet-setting art dealer. But after she learns he's just con artist who targets women for money, she plans payback.

programme.title: A Kidnapping in Amish Country
programme.desc: When Amish woman Lena realises her daughter has been abducted, she is forced to turn to the only person who can help: her estranged best friend Skye, who has renounced the Amish way of life.

programme.title: The Daughter I Gave Away
programme.desc: Fifteen years after a teenage girl places her baby up for adoption, she learns that her daughter has gone missing from the adoptive parent's home. In her search for answers, she uncovers a chilling truth.

programme.title: Robin Roberts Presents I Will Survive: The Gloria Gaynor Story
programme.desc: The film chronicles Gaynor's rise to fame, from her humble beginnings to becoming one of the most iconic voices in music history. The biopic will also delve into the personal challenges Gaynor faced.

programme.title: Love at First Lie
programme.desc: Kate thinks she's found her perfect online love match in a Walker, a jet-setting art dealer. But after she learns he's just con artist who targets women for money, she plans payback.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: House-flipping titan James takes on his toughest challenge yet. When his team finds a hoarder's nightmare with rotting walls, a sketchy layout and a collapsing roof, James is excited by the challenge.

programme.title: Casting 1147km
programme.desc: This time, it’s a team mission to portray a heated love triangle. With no script, the actors must create their own storyline and dialogue in just five hours. On top of that, a surprise judge arrives.

programme.title: The Face I Can't Forget
programme.desc: After waking from a car accident with total amnesia, Mia is taken home to be cared for by her loving husband and daughter. But as she recuperates, Mia has flashbacks of a second daughter.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Taking inspiration from one of his husband's favourite dishes as a child, Jake makes celery-root remoulade and adds a European twist to the fried chicken sandwich.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah combines French cuisine with deep Southern cooking in her take on bouillabaisse. She starts by making a homemade broth with fish remnants, vegetable scraps, spices and more in a pot.

programme.title: Love at First Lie
programme.desc: Kate thinks she's found her perfect online love match in a Walker, a jet-setting art dealer. But after she learns he's just con artist who targets women for money, she plans payback.

programme.title: Murder at the Lighthouse
programme.desc: Fleeing her abusive ex, Jess hires a fishing-boat captain to take her across Lake Superior to a new life in Canada. When an accident leaves her washed up on shore, she's taken in by a lighthouse keeper.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Actor and family friend Jeremy Sisto joins Rachael in her Tuscan kitchen to learn how to make hunter's chicken, known in Italy as cacciatore, served with generous helpings of bruschetta.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make bacalao con pomodoro, a dish inspired by an amazing meal she shared with husband John during a special trip to Elba, a Mediterranean island in Tuscany.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: The Mystery Box is back and it’s every chef for themselves. Without the protection of their regional teams, the chefs must individually face the challenge of preparing a gourmet meal out of army rations.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: The remaining home chefs must tackle a classic test: the tag team challenge. Contestants must take turns preparing a delicious three-course meal, working together to ensure they are on the same page.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers
programme.desc: After a 1,536km journey, the Earth-Cleaning Bros arrive in Olang Ol, a pristine nomadic village. They build their own ger and even try milking yaks!

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah combines French cuisine with deep Southern cooking in her take on bouillabaisse. She starts by making a homemade broth with fish remnants, vegetable scraps, spices and more in a pot.

programme.title: Casting 1147km
programme.desc: This time, it’s a team mission to portray a heated love triangle. With no script, the actors must create their own storyline and dialogue in just five hours. On top of that, a surprise judge arrives.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James butts heads when the competition, fellow flipper Rob, brings him a potential project: a split-level property with a massive yard in a prime neighbourhood. Rob's short on funds and full of confidence.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: For tonight's dinner party, Jake is making two of his simplest, most beloved recipes. You'll only need one bowl to make his moist, jammy olive oil cake and one sheet pan to create his baked gnocchi.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S2)
programme.desc: Dave has seventeen painful head bumps that concern his girlfriend and make him feel like a freak. Melissa recently moved to a new town but mysterious scaly lesions cover her legs and steal her confidence.

programme.title: The Boy Who Vanished
programme.desc: When her long-lost son returns a decade after his abduction, a mother's joy quickly turns to suspicion as he exhibits increasingly strange behaviour. What is he hiding? And is he even actually her son?

programme.title: The Ice Rink Murders
programme.desc: After time away from the ice, elite figure skater Megan returns to training, only to find that a killer targeting skaters is giving a whole new meaning to the phrase "cut-throat competition."

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: Your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. Hosted by Yvonne Man and David Ingles.

programme.title: Insight with Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: The definitive guide for global news audiences to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day, through probing interviews and nuanced conversations.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: Linking the market drivers from overnight in the US and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep dive analysis of the top business, energy and geopolitical stories shaping decisions.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: Live from London, we catch you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. Plus, we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The Opening Trade
programme.desc: Everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. We break down today's biggest stories and speak to guests with skin in the game.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, finance and politics. We go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

programme.title: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: Delivering the market news, data and analysis you need to set your agenda.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Daily conversations with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. Hosted by Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern.

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Bloomberg Open Interest with Matt Miller and Dani Burger - delivers the market-moving news you need to know to get a jump start on the US trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Tech
programme.desc: The only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories.

programme.title: Bloomberg Real Yield
programme.desc: A weekly show on fixed income with the biggest names in the field, covering sovereign and credit markets as investors grapple with fiscal, monetary and financial factors.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Bloomberg Businessweek Daily
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring you reporting from the magazine that helps global leaders stay ahead, plus insight on the people, companies and trends shaping today's complex economy.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Close
programme.desc: Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld break down the day's top market-moving stories and trading action around the closing bell.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, hosted by David Westin in New York.

programme.title: Bloomberg New Economy: Thriving in an Age of Extremes
programme.desc: Candid conversations with CEOs, investors, and government leaders focused on how to navigate and prosper in this age of economic uncertainty. Hosted by Erik Schatzker in Singapore.

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Mishal Husain, one of Britain's best interviewers, brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua speaks to chief executives and other industry leaders about what drives them and how they navigate and shape their companies amid significant change.

programme.title: The Circuit
programme.desc: A fast-paced, dynamic series that lives at the intersection of culture, tech, entertainment, and business. Hosted by high-profile journalist Emily Chang.

programme.title: The David Rubenstein Show
programme.desc: Philanthropist and financier David Rubenstein uncovers inside stories from the most influential minds in business.

programme.title: Bloomberg Originals
programme.desc: Exploring every angle of climate change, technology, finance, sports and beyond, Bloomberg Originals is business as you've never seen it.

programme.desc: The hazard map for Mt. Fuji was revised in 2021, revealing the possibility of greater damage from lava flows. We'll look at what lies behind those assumptions and what countermeasures can be taken.

programme.title: Design Museum Japan
programme.desc: Sato Taku (Graphic designer) visits Miyazaki. The crowded signs of local bars inspire Sato to reconsider the conventions of modern design, and embrace the appeal of the unknown.

programme.title: Kabuki Kool
programme.desc: The popular, but true story of two brothers who avenged their father inspired a dazzling variety of so many kabuki plays and dances. that they formed a new genre. Actor Ainosuke explores further.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Bon Odori: Rhythm and Connection
programme.desc: The Bon Odori dance, a Japanese summer tradition, has gone global. We look at events held in Malaysia and Brazil and explore the rhythms that bring people from diverse backgrounds together.

programme.title: A Culture Built with Wood Kishu
programme.desc: Kishu, in the southern part of the Kii Peninsula, is famous among chefs worldwide for its charcoal production. Join us as we examine what fuels the eco-friendly charcoal culture of Kishu.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Trails to Oishii Tokyo
programme.desc: The word yakumi refers to the use of traditional herbs and spices. Japanese food wouldn't be the same without favorites like wasabi or yuzu. See how these and more are influencing global food trends.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Darwin's Amazing Animals
programme.desc: Helping hands from Japan have arrived in Bhutan to aid local efforts in saving the endangered white-bellied heron from extinction. With just 60 or so remaining worldwide, it's a race against time.

programme.title: Time-lapse Journey
programme.desc: Nikko, in Tochigi Prefecture, is home to much natural beauty with its great mountains and lakes. The ornate Nikko Toshogu Shrine is famous. See the widely beloved Nikko through time-lapse photography.

programme.title: Rockie and Her Friends
programme.desc: Puppet action show for children. In a distant post-human future where surviving creatures have formed a community, new-breed dinosaur girl Rockie sets out on hilarious adventures with her schoolmates.

programme.title: Take Tech
programme.desc: A program for upper primary to lower secondary school children to explore the everyday technologies all around them. Each episode takes a piece of familiar tech to find out what it does and how.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: The Professionals: Rice Farmer
programme.desc: Seki Tomoharu once turned his back on farming; now he grows legendary rice that wins international awards. Why did he change? Amid rice shortages and global warming, he pursues his own green farming.

programme.title: Ramen Japan 5min.
programme.desc: A gourmet tour of ramen all around Japan. This time: the birthplace of tonkotsu, Fukuoka. Looking at three different styles, we'll learn this ramen's secrets, and the story of its creation.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Time and Tide
programme.desc: Time and Tide transcends time to detail extraordinary historical events in Japan and the world. Join NHK WORLD-JAPAN on a journey that reveals the truth behind some of the turning points of the past.

programme.title: Cinematic Journey
programme.desc: Join our explorers as they pursue the cinematic beauty of Japan. Kyle Card hikes the newly designated long trail around majestic Mt. Fuji and discovers its secrets.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE: A Bedtime Routine
programme.desc: On those hot, humid summer nights, nothing can get in the way of sleep like mosquitoes on the hunt. We learn about the tools the Edo townspeople had at their disposal to fight the pesky insects.

Deer Squad
programme.desc: The Deer finds a video of a marine 'monster' from Kai's drone and go underwater to investigate. But things aren't always what they seem. // Lady Fluffpot and Sir Steel spend a day in space onboard Deer Squad's Space Station.

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Holly goes with Ben and his family to the seaside. No one packed lunch, so Holly uses magic to make some. // Holly has to make a birthday card for Ben by herself, without magic. When she gives him the card, she's embarrassed that it's hand-made.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma. // Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie. // Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Café Carl opens up a smoothie shop on the boardwalk! But when the coaster causes coconut chaos, Rubble & Crew know just what to do. // Rubble & Crew work together to find a construction solution when Charger's bouncy birthday surprise needs a lift!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to give Grocer Gabriel the best beach day ever... including a ride on a brand new Ferris wheel at the boardwalk! // When Farmer Zoe's animals need some relaxation, the pups build a perfect place to practice yoga with Coach Karima.

programme.title: DORA
programme.desc: Isa's throwing a party where everyone will be dancing the Rainforest Ritmo. Boots has to learn the dance before they get there! // Dora leads everyone into the Tricky Trappy Forest to recover Tico's magic nut that can turn into your favorite food.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Green Queen is turning everything in Axle City... green! Luckily Blaze, Watts, and Darington can transform into superheroes! Can they stop The Green Queen before Axle City is one color forever?

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: When Mr. Crocodile loses a tooth, Daisy wants to make sure he gets a visit from the tooth fairy. // Mr. Crocodile, Daisy and their friends are scared to fetch Martin's gloves from his spooky shed.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: The Barbababies love bedtime stories, except if they are always the same... // Barbabelle had a restless night because of all the insects!

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Barbazoo have plenty of things to write about in his diary! // After reading the biography of Nellie Bly, Barbalib is determined to become a Great Reporter!

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure. // It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town. // Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: In the first ever Blaze Musical, Blaze, AJ, Crusher, and Pickle are on a daring quest to find the pieces of the Broken Key and unlock a secret treasure

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines
programme.desc: Today, Blaze and AJ are on a mission to become Lifeguards. But it'll take four daring rescues to achieve their official Lifeguard badge and only the bravest monster trucks have what it takes.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew help Auntie Crane when Speed Meister challenges her to see who's the fastest soap box car racer in Builder Cove. // When Wingsy the eagle is having takeoff trouble, Rubble & Crew work with Dr. Diwa to help teach her how to fly again.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: When Camila the truck driver needs a place to stop and eat, the pups and Café Carl have a fancy idea. But is it too fancy? // Park Ranger Rose and Rosie the goat are putting on a show! But when Rosie disappears, can the pups find her before showtime?

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Apollo the Super Pup comes to Adventure Bay, in Rubble’s dream. The pups must rescue their super hero! // Raimundo’s dancing hippos shake, rattle, and roll the big top down. The Paw Patrol rebuild just in time for the big show!

programme.title: Deer Squad
programme.desc: When Steel accidentally turns himself into a baby, he wreaks havoc on Platinum City. // It's the annual "Day of Fun"! However when Ricardo and Trickalien play the ultimate prank on the Deer Squad, the day of fun soon turns into a day of chaos!

programme.title: DORA
programme.desc: Dora and Boots meet Shelly, a hermit crab missing her shell, who uses one of Boots' boots. Dora travels across the beach in search of her old shell. // Papi is having a quesadilla picnic, but he forgot the ingredients! Dora sets off to deliver them.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Now there's more to explore with DORA! Join the iconic exploradora in amazing adventures with friends old and new as she journeys across the wacky and wonderful Rainforest with her best friend Boots by her side.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim does all he can to get the new DinoStar toy. // It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop. // Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and friends are at playgroup and Mr Bull is building a wind turbine. Madame Gazelle tells the children all about wind power, whilst Mr Bull and the workmen have a lovely cup of tea made from wind power.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mandy Mouse has a birthday visit to a cheese theme park with Peppa and her friends. Everything in the park is cheese-themed - Mandy loves cheese!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family have a day out at the seaside and build a very large sandcastle with all their friends.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: It's raining and Peppa is sad because she can't go out to play. When the rain stops, Peppa feels better and she and George get ready to play one of their favorite games - jumping in mud puddles!

programme.title: Dial M for Murder
programme.desc: Academy Award winners Grace Kelly and Ray Milland star with Robert Cummings in one of Alfred Hitchcock's greatest thrillers--Dial M for Murder. When playboy tennis pro Tony Wendice (Milland--The Lost Weekend) discovers his rich wife, Margot (Kelly--Rear Window, To Catch a Thief), is having an affair with handsome American Mark Hallidy (Cummings--The Carpetbaggers), he devises an ingenious plot to murder her. But when his scheme takes an unexpected, deadly twist, Tony improvises--implicating Margot for first degree murder in this classic spellbinder.

programme.title: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: Firefighter Gordon Brewer, is done putting out fires and ready to start one of his own. When his wife and child are horrifically killed in an international terrorist bombing -- linked to Claudio "The Wolf" Perrini -- the CIA and FBI offer no answers and no response. With the official investigation going nowhere, and haunted by the thought of his family's killer walking away scot-free, Gordon swears revenge, even if it takes him to Colombia.

programme.title: King Arthur: Legend of the Sword
programme.desc: Acclaimed filmmaker Guy Ritchie brings his dynamic style to the epic fantasy action adventure "King Arthur: Legend of the Sword." Starring Charlie Hunnam in the title role, the film is an iconoclastic take on the classic Excalibur myth, tracing Arthur's journey from the streets to the throne. When the child Arthur's father is murdered, Vortigern (Jude Law), Arthur's uncle, seizes the crown. Robbed of his birthright and with no idea who he truly is, Arthur comes up the hard way in the back alleys of the city. But once he pulls the sword from the stone, his life is turned upside down and he is forced to acknowledge his true legacy...whether he likes it or not.

programme.title: The Legend of Tarzan (2016)
programme.desc: A new live-action adventure from director David Yates (Harry Potter films) brings Edgar Rice Burroughs' legendary character back to the big screen. It's been years since the man once known as Tarzan (Alexander Skarsgard --True Blood) left the jungles of Africa behind for a gentrified life as John Clayton III, Lord Greystoke, with his beloved wife, Jane (Margot Robbie --The Wolf of Wall Street) at his side. Now, he has been invited back to the Congo to serve as a trade emissary of Parliament, unaware that he is a pawn in a deadly convergence of greed and revenge, masterminded by the Belgian, Captain Leon Rom (Oscar® winner Christoph Waltz). But those behind the murderous plot have no idea what they are about to unleash.

programme.title: Elvis
programme.desc: Visionary filmmaker Baz Luhrmann explores the life and music of Elvis Presley in this epic film starring Austin Butler and Tom Hanks.

programme.title: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Academy Award winner Henry Fonda stars in director Alfred Hitchcock's real-life thriller of an innocent man trapped as the victim of a heartless criminal justice system--even though he's The Wrong Man. When an eyewitness to a robbery identifies musician Christopher Balestrero (Fonda) as the culprit, Balestrero cannot prove where he was on the day of the crime. Now, the wheels of justice--driven by the testimony of witnesses--mercilessly grind away the life of a man who looks remarkably like the real thief. Based on the novel The True Story of Christopher Emmanuel Balestrero by Maxwell Anderson.

programme.title: ER S2 19
programme.desc: Hathaway worries about Shep's increasingly violent behavior. Carter competes with a surgical resident in training when he learns that only the top students will make it to the second year.

programme.title: ER S2 20
programme.desc: Doug has sex with his father's girlfriend. Greene and Jen discuss their divorce and have sex. Chloe takes Susie away, and Lewis focuses intently on her job, which impresses Weaver.

programme.title: Friends S8 18
programme.desc: Monica becomes inarticulate while giving her toast at a anniversary party for her parents.

programme.title: Friends S8 19
programme.desc: Joey is thrilled when his name is used in a Soap Opera Digest crossword puzzle.

programme.title: Friends S8 20
programme.desc: Rachel panics during a party in anticipation of her baby's birth.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S4 14
programme.desc: Michael unveils the ancient mystery behind bowling balls, and later does the world's longest spit-take! Plus, LITERALLY THE BIGGEST special guest in the show's history, a.k.a. Shaquille O'Neal, helps with a plan to blow one superfan's mind!

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S4 15
programme.desc: While posing as a cook, Michael warms up his vocal chords to serenade a clam out of its shell, and later, he shocks his sous chef with a fish stick stowaway. Plus, a spirited trick leaves one man questioning the afterlife.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S4 16
programme.desc: When Michael opens a shocking package at a shipment warehouse, a man goes hog wild. And while pigs may not fly, Michael proves that kittens can. Plus, one woman believes that a curse has transformed a man right before her eyes.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 3
programme.desc: Competition boils over when bitter rivals Brandon and Jesse throw down over a storage unit containing an amazing movie monster and a potential hundred thousand dollar payout. Security steps in, but can they separate the boys before the blood hits thefloor?

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 4
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori look to cash in on their first big trip to New Orleans, but the locals are hungering for a fight. Then, the Taylor Brothers wage war to win a locker loaded with hunting and sporting equipment. What no one knows is that hidden beneaththe fishing poles, bear traps and camping gear is the score of a lifetime. And later, fireworks explode when a locker full of liquor and rare Mardi Gras masks spark a do or die bidding war.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 5
programme.desc: Back on the bayou, the buyers are ready to crack open the abandoned lockers and throw down some serious cash. Local legend FJ sees big dollar signs in old voodoo artifacts. Brandon and Lori unearth a rare find with a potentially priceless payout. Andall bets are off when a bidding war over endangered species taxidermy ends in a heated stand-off with the local authorities.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 6
programme.desc: The buyers press their luck in Sin City where Brandon and Lori get outfoxed by a group of locals with a questionable strategy. Then, Jesse gambles on a locker filled with junk. Everyone thinks he's crazy, but he knows something they don't. And later,vintage slot machines and poker tables send bidding through the roof. The closing price is stratospheric, but what's hidden from sight will be the ultimate payday for one lucky Storage Hunter.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S1 7
programme.desc: Jesse taunts Brandon and Lori in the hopes of instigating a fight and later unearths a ticking treasure. Then, seasoned local Victor throws down his bankroll for a trove of luxury goods, but are they actually knock-offs? And later, Brandon and Lori think they've hit the jackpot with a cache of firearms, but when Lori's gun accidentally goes off inside the locker, Brandon is caught in the crosshairs.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S6 10
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Sal, and Joe provide a false sense of security to some sassy shoppers at a drug store, and the competition reaches new heights during a rematch of their balloon challenge in the grocery store. And tonight the guys laugh and cry their way through the first ever permanent punishment!

programme.title: Friends S8 16
programme.desc: Guilt-ridden Joey finally confesses his love for Rachel to the flabbergasted Ross.

programme.title: Friends S8 17
programme.desc: Feeling awkward after revealing his romantic feelings to Rachel, Joey avoids contact with her.

programme.title: Friends S8 18
programme.desc: Monica becomes inarticulate while giving her toast at a anniversary party for her parents.

programme.title: Friends S8 19
programme.desc: Joey is thrilled when his name is used in a Soap Opera Digest crossword puzzle.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S6 11
programme.desc: The guys cannonball into an uncomfortable poolside encounter, and convince strangers to press send on their absurd e-mails. Later, tonight's loser presents a shocking senior citizen initiative to a community planning board.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S6 12
programme.desc: It's foul play when the guys work stadium security! Then, the guys contaminate evidence during a crime scene investigation class. Plus, tonight's loser develops multiple personality disorder when opening for Legends in Concert.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S6 13
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr head to the casino to see if they can play their cards right as Blackjack dealers. Then they team up for a complex guessing game in the park and polish strangers' footwear to an imperfect shine. Tonight's loser takes a pounding on the mound at a Brooklyn Cyclone's game, but it's a mystery lover who is delivering the blows.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S6 14
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q, and Murr ham it up behind the counter of a famous NYC deli, and head to Union Square where they break the ice with bizarre behavior while selling popsicles. And tonight's loser wishes Bingo wasn't his name-o in a humiliating and cringe-worthy punishment.

programme.title: ER S2 19
programme.desc: Hathaway worries about Shep's increasingly violent behavior. Carter competes with a surgical resident in training when he learns that only the top students will make it to the second year.

programme.title: ER S2 20
programme.desc: Doug has sex with his father's girlfriend. Greene and Jen discuss their divorce and have sex. Chloe takes Susie away, and Lewis focuses intently on her job, which impresses Weaver.

programme.title: He's Just Not That Into You
programme.desc: A group of interconnected Baltimore-based twenty and thirtysomethings navigate their various relationships from the shallow end of the dating pool through the deep murky waters of married life trying to read the signs of the opposite sex - and hoping to be the exceptions to the no-exceptions rule. Gigi just wants a man who says he'll call - and does - while Alex advises her to stop sitting by the phone. Beth wonders if she should call it off after years of committed singlehood with her boyfriend Neil but he doesn't think there's a single thing wrong with their unmarried life. Janine's not sure if she can trust her husband Ben who can't quite trust himself around Anna. Anna can't decide between the sexy married guy or her straightforward no-sparks standby Conor who can't get over the fact that he can't have her. And Mary who's found an entire network of loving supportive men just needs to find one who's straight.

programme.title: Into the Storm
programme.desc: In the span of a single day, the town of Silverton is ravaged by an unprecedented onslaught of tornadoes. The entire town is at the mercy of the erratic and deadly cyclones, even as storm trackers predict the worst is yet to come. Most people seek shelter, while others run towards the vortex, testing how far a storm chaser will go for that once-in-a-lifetime shot. Told through the eyes and lenses of professional storm chasers, thrill-seeking amateurs, and courageous townspeople, "Into the Storm" throws you directly into the eye of the storm to experience Mother Nature at her most extreme.

programme.title: Green Lantern
programme.desc: In a universe as vast as it is mysterious, a small but powerful force has existed for centuries. Protectors of peace and justice, they are called the Green Lantern Corps.

programme.title: Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Two sly government agents, one a charmer and the other a master of disguise, are sent to stop an insanely brilliant scientist who plans to assassinate the President of the United States.

programme.title: Firewall
programme.desc: Paul Nilsson, a successful security chief for an international bank, finds himself a pawn in a dangerous game when he receives word that his family has been kidnapped. The kidnappers, led by devious and ruthless mastermind Bill Cox, force Paul to rob his bank and commit one of the largest thefts in history. The situation becomes more ominous when he realizes that he is being set up for embezzlement and all traces of the real thieves will vanish. What follows is a high-stakes game of cat and mouse as Paul uses his security expertise to try and turn the tables on the criminals.

programme.title: North By Northwest
programme.desc: Cary Grant stars as an innocent man mistaken for a spy in one of director Alfred Hitchcock's greatest thrillers. While leaving New York's Plaza Hotel, advertising executive Roger Thornhill (Grant) has the misfortune of standing just as the name "George Kaplan" is paged--starting a lethal case of mistaken identity and a nonstop game of cat and mouse as he is pursued across North America by espionage agents trying to kill him--and by police who suspect him of murder.

programme.title: Friends S8 20
programme.desc: Rachel panics during a party in anticipation of her baby's birth.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 13
programme.desc: After Penny quits her job and Sheldon is forced to take another vacation, the two spend a lot of time together.

programme.title: Smallville S1 11
programme.desc: Clark is amazed when a pesticide magnate with enhanced powers of persuasion due to the meteor fragments convinces Jonathan to sell the family farm.

programme.title: Smallville S1 12
programme.desc: When Clark rescues his classmate, Eric, from an electrical storm, they’re each struck by lightning -- and Clark’s superpowers are transferred to Eric.

programme.title: Smallville S1 13
programme.desc: Clark and Lex are mystified when the Luthor mansion is robbed by burglars who seem to have the ability to walk through walls.

programme.title: Smallville S1 14
programme.desc: Lex faces the consequences of a scandal from his past in Metropolis when an old enemy comes to Smallville intent on destroying Lex's life, putting Clark and Lana in danger.

programme.title: Smallville S1 15
programme.desc: Clark must solve the riddle of the mysterious Nicodemus flower and Lex's suspicious involvement with it.

programme.desc: Michael loses a credit card in a series of absorbing containers, and then in an art store, he shakes off sloppy handwriting to reveal fancy calligraphy. Later, a catering assistant gets spooked when chinaware sets itself.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S4 24
programme.desc: As a bank teller, Michael proves chipmunks are nature's accountants. Then while servicing a wake, Michael brings a toy to life, and later, he stuns a museum worker by restarting the evolutionary process for a fossilized creature.

programme.desc: The Direstas find a curbside treasure which inspires Jimmy to dismantle John's sentimental typewriter and transform it into a steampunk masterpiece.

programme.desc: An old bike, a rusty chainsaw, and some childhood memories inspire the boys to invent a one of a kind motorized flea market masterpiece.

programme.title: Asia First

programme.title: Detective Dee's Seven Deadly Sin
programme.desc: Detective Dee becomes embroiled in a series of murders that shake the Tang Empire. The killer invokes the "Seven Deadly Sins" to justify a twisted sense of justice. In his relentless pursuit of the truth, Detective Dee uncovers the mask of false righteousness and exposes the darkness hidden beneath.

programme.title: The Spore
programme.desc: Global warming has awakened a malevolent spore from beneath an ancient ice field, unleashing a horrific plague that ravages humanity. Fleeing the chaos, Meadow takes refuge in an abandoned cabin. Together with other strangers, she fights to survive as some succumb to the plague, transforming into ravenous hunters who now stalk the living.

programme.title: A Sealed Book
programme.desc: The world descends into darkness when a sealed book, said to command the forces of the universe, is unearthed in an underground palace in the desert. As adventurers race to claim its power, the palace gates open, unleashing an unseen terror and heralding a catastrophe beyond imagination.

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Photographer Zhi Cheng is entangled with a "woman in red", leading to the deaths of his relatives one by one. When the girl he likes, Si Tong, also dies mysteriously, Zhi Cheng vows to find out the truth but ends up revealing the secret of a "ghost marriage"...

programme.title: Behave
programme.desc: Following the death of their friend, a group of young adults travels to a villa on the outskirts of London that contains a deep mystery. As unsettling events escalate during their luxurious stay, they must unravel the villa’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Detective Dee's Seven Deadly Sin
programme.desc: Detective Dee becomes embroiled in a series of murders that shake the Tang Empire. The killer invokes the "Seven Deadly Sins" to justify a twisted sense of justice. In his relentless pursuit of the truth, Detective Dee uncovers the mask of false righteousness and exposes the darkness hidden beneath.

programme.title: The Spore

As adventurers race to claim its power, the palace gates open, unleashing an unseen terror and heralding a catastrophe beyond imagination.

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Photographer Zhi Cheng is entangled with a "woman in red", leading to the deaths of his relatives one by one. When the girl he likes, Si Tong, also dies mysteriously, Zhi Cheng vows to find out the truth but ends up revealing the secret of a "ghost marriage"...

programme.title: 7ujuh
programme.desc: 7 friends go on a road trip to a remote bungalow run by a village head and his daughter Suri. They host a party and ask Suri to help. Things spiral out of control and Suri is raped. Before killing herself, she curses them to be haunted in their dreams. As the friends are killed off one by one, they must break the curse to escape their deadly fate.

programme.title: The Ice Cream Truck
programme.desc: Mary moves back to her suburban hometown as her husband is relocated there for work. While waiting for her husband in their new house, Mary becomes the target of an evil slasher that stalks the suburbs in an ice-cream truck. She soon learns that the suburbs are not what they seem...

programme.title: Open the Coffin
programme.desc: Ghost Hand and his tomb raiders resurface in Jiang City to seek gold in ancient tombs after a 3-year absence. They released an evil spirit from a coffin and all four died at home eventually. Poison and pinholes in the corpses become the sole clue for police investigation. A tomb raid now unfolds as a perplexing and mysterious case.

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: As a young mother grapples with her daughter's mysterious disappearance, a series of eerie events unfold. These events could be linked to the vengeful ghosts of a tragic accident that happened 20 years ago...

programme.title: Evie
programme.desc: When young Evie discovers a cursed necklace washed up on the beach, she is unaware of the malevolent force tied to it. As the necklace's dark power begins to grip her, she inadvertently awakens a deadly water demon intent on claiming her and everyone she holds dear.

programme.title: 7ujuh
programme.desc: 7 friends go on a road trip to a remote bungalow run by a village head and his daughter Suri. They host a party and ask Suri to help. Things spiral out of control and Suri is raped. Before killing herself, she curses them to be haunted in their dreams. As the friends are killed off one by one, they must break the curse to escape their deadly fate.

programme.title: The Ice Cream Truck
programme.desc: Mary moves back to her suburban hometown as her husband is relocated there for work. While waiting for her husband in their new house, Mary becomes the target of an evil slasher that stalks the suburbs in an ice-cream truck. She soon learns that the suburbs are not what they seem...

programme.title: Evie

programme.title: 3AM - The Campsite
programme.desc: A group of friends goes on a camping trip inside a supposedly haunted forest despite warning not to do so. As night falls and camps are set, the complicated relationships of lust and love between them are exposed, triggering a series of paranormal events that punishes them. When dawn breaks, who will get out of the forest alive?

programme.title: Creepy Pasta
programme.desc: Trapped in an abandoned house, a young man desperately searches for clues about his trapped situation. The unsettling truth actually lies in a sequence of viral videos and they gradually corrupt his mind…

programme.title: Never Leave
programme.desc: Strange incidents keep happening in Lin Yue's house after a car accident: her sister cannot see the images of her family members in the mirror; her father is peeping at night; and there is the sound of marbles from the attic every day at dawn. Following the sound to the attic, Lin Yue finds her own death portrait as she opens the door...

programme.title: 3AM - The Office
programme.desc: The Hungry Ghost Festival is around the corner. A newcomer at a workplace offends the ghosts in his office building when he shows disrespect for the spirits on his first day at work. In the course of a night shift, the man and his colleagues working overtime experience spooky encounters that make them reflect on their behaviours and beliefs...

programme.title: Room For Rent
programme.desc: Lonely widow Joyce rents out a room in her house and becomes dangerously obsessed with a younger guest. Desperate for love, she is willing to eliminate anyone hindering her pursuit of happiness, and a chilling tale of obsession unfolds.

programme.title: Mid-night Two
programme.desc: Yi Cheng and his friends venture into a haunted mountain that hides an ancient corpse and an eternal ghostly flame. No one who enters the mountain ever returns and at 2:30 AM, Yi Cheng’s friends vanish one by one. While searching for them in the eerie forest, Yi Cheng enters a realm of infinite reincarnation, facing a series of terrifying events…

programme.title: The Elite of Devils
programme.desc: Five university students are assigned a project at a mysterious estate, where they meet Lady Salakjit, an elite socialite with a deadly secret. As her demonic powers surface, their academic trip turns into a frantic struggle for survival against a centuries-old curse of the ruling class.

programme.title: Zhong Kui Exorcism
programme.desc: After hunting fox demons, Zhong Kui returns to Heyang Village only to discover that his lover and neighbours have been slaughtered. Following the trail to Lingdu City, he encounters Princess Liu Li, who has been cursed into a half-human, half-monster form. Armed with his demon-slaying sword, he battles the demons to save Liu Li and protect the city.

programme.title: The Case of Disappearances
programme.desc: In Misty Village, the adopted son Wen Jie is haunted by a recurring nightmare. He delves into a series of disappearance cases in the village to seek his true identity. As more villagers die mysteriously, belief in the curse of Emperor Jing Lung intensifies. Wen Jie teams up with the security chief to unveil the conspiracy and protect the villagers.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Lonely Ah Zhen is bullied by his coworkers. When he spends his birthday with Yumi, his friends shockingly discover that Yumi is an inflatable doll. Seeking companionship, Ah Zhen turns to the internet and finds his ideal girl Mina. Her arrival transforms his life but a series of unexpected events unfold as her identity as a vampire is revealed.

programme.title: Red Snow
programme.desc: Olivia, an outstanding vampire romance novelist, longs to encounter a real vampire. Her wish comes true when Luke turns up at her remote snowbound cabin seeking for help. However, her dream transforms into a chilling nightmare on Christmas Eve when Luke's vampire companions track him down...

programme.title: 3AM - The Driver
programme.desc: A taxi driver who is constantly judging others by his own standards, also reads into their every move and sets out to help ‘victims’ in his own way. When a woman he likes seems to be bullied by her son, he goes about setting things right for her, even resorting to turning himself into a cold-blooded serial killer…

programme.title: The Elite of Devils
programme.desc: Five university students are assigned a project at a mysterious estate, where they meet Lady Salakjit, an elite socialite with a deadly secret. As her demonic powers surface, their academic trip turns into a frantic struggle for survival against a centuries-old curse of the ruling class.
